## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run `drupal-watcher start` in `...`
2. Edit file `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Drupal version: [e.g. 10.3, 11.0]
- Drush version: `drush --version`
- drupal-watcher version: `drupal-watcher version`
- Watch mode: [auto / fsnotify / poll / hybrid]
